description:
# Open question (placeholder, out of scope until spec stabilizes)

Migration from current balls to greenfield.

Current state:
- balls state lives on `balls/tasks` orphan branch as JSON files
- Some state references on `main` (e.g. `[bl-xxxx]` commit tags)
- `.balls/state-repo/` materialized clones (per the master_url model)
- Plugins live in `.balls/plugins/` with JSON config

Greenfield target:
- balls state on `balls` branch as YAML files
- Nothing on main
- XDG-rooted operating dirs
- New plugin contract

Likely migration shape:
- `bl migrate` one-shot tool
- Translates JSON → YAML, balls/tasks → balls
- Moves config/plugins to `config/plugins/<name>/`
- Bootstraps XDG dirs from existing `.balls/` content
- Preserves history (or starts fresh and leaves the old branch as an archive)

Defer detailed work until spec lands.
title: Topic: migration from current balls (placeholder)
